description_long: This is a white, dimpled sports ball resembling a golf ball, featuring a continuous red stripe encircling its circumference. The surface is covered with a regular pattern of hexagonal dimples, enhancing its aerodynamic properties. On one side, there is a bold black oval marking, which stands out against the otherwise uniform white surface. The red stripe is cleanly applied and visually divides the ball into two hemispheres. The ball appears to be made of a hard, glossy material, likely a polymer or resin shell, with an air-filled core. There are no visible signs of wear, branding, or team insignia, giving it a pristine and generic appearance.
description: A white, dimpled sports ball with a red stripe around its middle and a black oval marking on one side. The surface is glossy and pristine, with no visible branding or wear.
description_view_0: A white ball with a red stripe encircling its middle and a dimpled surface, no additional markings visible.
description_view_1: The same white, dimpled ball with a red stripe, now showing a prominent black oval marking on the lower side.
description_view_2: A white, dimpled ball with a red stripe, similar to view 0, with no black marking visible.
description_view_3: A white, dimpled ball with a red stripe, no black marking visible, similar to views 0 and 2.
attribute_sport-specific_markings: A continuous red stripe encircles the ball's circumference; the surface is covered in hexagonal dimples. There is a single black oval marking on one side. No other sport-specific markings are visible.
